revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from given name |name=From a given name |from=a person's [[given name]] |info=It is used because Wikipedia has only one article about a person with this given name, or because one individual is the [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Primary topic|most likely topic sought by this given name]] (other persons who share this name might be listed at an [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Anthroponymy|anthroponymy article]] or at the end of a disambiguation page). |main category=Redirects from given names }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|nocat||{{Main other|[[Category:Given names]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from given name |name=From a given name |from=a person's [[given name]] |info=It is used because Wikipedia has only one article about a person with this given name, or because one individual is the [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation#Primary topic|most likely topic sought by this given name]] (other persons who share this name might be listed at an [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Anthroponymy|anthroponymy article]] or at the end of a disambiguation page). |main category=Redirects from given names }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|nocat||{{Main other|[[Category:Given names]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
